title: In The Beginning
content:
Going thru my pile of papers, I came across "the origin" of [FinalPiece](http://www.finalpiece.net). We had a problem register the old name, iDESIGNPLUS, with the government (for some stupid reasons). So we have to come up with a new name for the company.

I can't remember the reason why we came up with [FinalPiece](http://www.finalpiece.net) but we had a couple of ideas.

![](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/in_the_beginning/01.jpg)

We settled with [FinalPiece](http://www.finalpiece.net). Then we had to come up with the logo. We only tried out one. But I don't know why we stopped there.

!https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/in_the_beginning/02.jpg!

Anyway, the current logo was done by [n~Por](http://www.deviantart.com/deviation/37046570/?qo=6&q=finalpiece+boost%3Apopular+age_sigma%3A24h+age_scale%3A5) and modified a little by my project manager/graphic designer.

I can't remember which came first, the slogan or the draft logo.

![](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/in_the_beginning/03.jpg)

Between all that, we did came up with the *menu*.

![](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/in_the_beginning/04.jpg)

And that's how [FinalPiece](http://www.finalpiece.net) began.

Oh, is it okay if I post the company banner on my own website? :P

[![](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/fpc_banner_115x150.png)](http://www.finalpiece.net/links/)

Peace .. and *real* democracy. ;)
